# AppTechno

> AppTechno is a software company that builds free, privacy-friendly online tools and apps. All apps run entirely in the user's browser or as hosted web apps — no unnecessary data collection.

## Available Apps

**File Consolidator** — https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net
Merge multiple CSV and Excel files into one spreadsheet. Combine PDF files and images (JPG, JPEG) into a single PDF. All processing is 100% local in the browser. Free, no account required.

**BudgetWise** — https://budgetwise.apptechno.net
Free personal budget tracker. Track income, manage expenses by category, scan receipts with OCR (JPG, JPEG, PDF), plan monthly budgets, compare budget vs actual, and forecast year-end finances. Available in 6 languages. Free plan + premium ($12.99/year). Works as a PWA on Android and iOS.

**DocWise** — https://docwise.apptechno.net
PDF and document toolbox. Merge, split, compress PDFs. OCR on scanned documents. Convert images to PDF. Compare documents side by side. All processing 100% local — no uploads. Free, works as PWA.

**CVwise** — https://cvwise.apptechno.net
AI-powered CV optimizer. Upload your resume (PDF or DOCX), paste a job posting URL (LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, Greenhouse, and more), and Claude AI (Anthropic) rewrites your CV to match the job requirements. Features: ATS keyword match scoring, PDF + DOCX export, cover letter AI generation, version history. Free plan (3 optimizations/month) + Pro plans ($11.99/mo, $99.99/yr, $279.99/3yr). Works as PWA.

## Company Values

- Privacy First: Local processing where possible, minimal data collection
- Free to Use: Core features free, optional Pro plans for power users
- Works Everywhere: Fully responsive — desktop, tablet, mobile, PWA
- Secure: Supabase RLS, no third-party data sharing

## Technology

- Static sites hosted on Cloudflare Pages
- Apps built with Next.js, React, Supabase, Vercel AI SDK
- AI powered by Anthropic Claude (Haiku + Sonnet)
- Supports multiple languages

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://apptechno.net

- DocWise: https://docwise.apptechno.net
